CE1.justification: Acted directly on the runbook without asking the user to load, restate, or clarify anything.

CE2.justification: Response is mostly compact and useful, but the per-item bullet recap plus the Path-to-Go restatement duplicates content already written into the checklist file.

CE3.justification: Named the artifact path (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md) and why it's there (filled checklist + inline Go/No-go reasoning) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single file artifact written at the canonical path with the decision inline; an interruption leaves no orphan or in-progress state to triage.
